summary: Validated the 5 new lead qualification fields on POST /api/leads, the contact form UI flow with new dropdowns/checkboxes, persistence to MongoDB via admin endpoint, and the complete removal of Emergent branding (badge, script, phrase) from the page. Backend pytest: 9/9 passed. Frontend Playwright e2e: all assertions passed. Admin login + Home page smoke: pass. Commercial form regression: pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 478-line file with models + routes + auth + startup all together — should be split into modules (auth.py, models.py, routes/leads.py, routes/admin.py) before it grows further.

admin_list_leads still treats _id implicitly via projection — good; consider adding consistent ISO-parsing of created_at like the legacy /leads endpoint, or vice versa, to keep response shapes uniform.
LeadCreate uses str for email but never validates format — consider switching to pydantic.EmailStr to reject malformed emails at the 422 level instead of letting them through.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed leads (TEST_QualUser, TEST_LegacyUser, TEST_UI User, TEST_CommercialReg) during testing — these are flagged for easy identification/cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is at /app/backend/tests/test_leads_qualification.py — covers qualification round-trip, default values, 400 validation cases (no consent / no name / no email), emergent branding absent in HTML, commercial multipart regression, and admin login. UI flow uses data-testids: contact-name, contact-email, contact-phone, contact-interest (7 options), contact-bill, contact-timeline (5 options), contact-qual-ownership, contact-svc-solar/battery/electrical, contact-consent-checkbox, contact-submit, contact-success. Submit is disabled until consent is ticked. Verified persisted lead in /api/admin/leads contains all new fields with exact submitted values.
